payload.title: [HIGH] Cross-tenant alias disclosure (role checked on selector, data from param)
payload.description: GET /api/projects/:tenantId/aliases (src/server.js:339) gates with requireTenantRole (resolves tenant from X-Scope-Project/?project selector) but reads listAliases(req.params.tenantId). tenant_aliases has no RLS. A viewer on their own board reads any other board's alias->account_id map (membership + internal-id disclosure; feeds the impersonation bug). FIX: authorize on req.params.tenantId (getRole) like the POST/DELETE alias routes do.
